overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through Night City. The journey transitions from a neon-lit covered corridor to bright daylight on elevated highways between futuristic skyscrapers, eventually descending to busy street level with pedestrians and traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered neon-lit commercial corridor with digital signage

events.description: vehicle slows to navigate around a parked white van on the left side of the corridor

agents.ego_description: navigating through the covered neon corridor, steering around obstacles and maintaining moderate speed

notable_agents.action: white van parked on the left side of the narrow corridor, partially obstructing the path

entered.detail: enclosed roadway with overhead neon lighting and futuristic architecture
large vertical digital display emitting pink and purple light
red and black building exterior with illuminated windows and geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a narrow, covered urban corridor bathed in artificial neon light from digital billboards and overhead fixtures. The enclosed space features futuristic architecture with red and black building facades, while the driver navigates around a parked white van on the left.

events.description: vehicle exits the covered corridor into bright morning sunlight, causing a dramatic shift from artificial neon to natural lighting
vehicle accelerates while merging onto the main elevated highway ramp

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto the elevated highway while navigating between towering glass skyscrapers in bright daylight

notable_agents.action: silver sports car driving ahead on the elevated highway, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: tall curved glass building reflecting sunlight, dominating the left side of the view
multi-lane elevated roadway structure extending into the distance
tropical palm trees lining the right side of the elevated roadway

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered corridor into brilliant morning sunlight, the scene opens onto a wide elevated highway flanked by towering glass skyscrapers. The vehicle accelerates along the multi-lane road, passing palm trees on the right while following a silver sports car ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban canyon with high-rise towers and monorail tracks

events.description: vehicle begins descending on a curved ramp, changing elevation while navigating between buildings
roadway passes under an overhead bridge structure, creating a brief covered section

agents.ego_description: descending on elevated ramps through the urban canyon, navigating curves between towering buildings and under overpasses

entered.detail: elevated monorail track structure running parallel to the roadway
concrete bridge structure passing over the roadway, creating shadow

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues along elevated highways through an urban canyon, with glass skyscrapers now passing closely on the left. The road descends on curved ramps, passing under overhead bridges and alongside elevated monorail tracks while maintaining speed through the futuristic cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending covered ramp transitioning to street level

events.description: vehicle enters a darker covered section of the ramp, significantly reducing natural light
vehicle exits the covered ramp, emerging back into daylight as it approaches street level

agents.ego_description: navigating the descending ramp through covered and open sections, slowing as the vehicle approaches ground level

entered.detail: dark enclosed ramp section with artificial lighting and concrete walls
tall concrete barriers lining the descending roadway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends through a transitional ramp that alternates between covered tunnel sections and open areas. Concrete walls line the left side while the road curves downward, eventually emerging from the darkness back into daylight as the vehicle nears ground level.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown city street with commercial shops and pedestrian crossings

events.description: vehicle approaches an intersection with traffic lights and crosswalks, slowing for urban traffic
vehicle slows significantly to navigate through the intersection with active pedestrian crossings

agents.ego_description: driving through busy city streets, navigating intersections and sharing the road with other vehicles while pedestrians walk on sidewalks

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking along the sidewalk and waiting at the crosswalk corner
black sedan driving ahead through the intersection, maintaining traffic flow

entered.detail: ground-level commercial storefronts with signage and displays
marked zebra crossing lines on the asphalt
overhead traffic signal fixtures suspended above the intersection

segments.scene_description: Now at ground level, the vehicle drives through a busy downtown street lined with commercial shops and pedestrians on the sidewalks. The scene features marked crosswalks, traffic lights overhead, and moderate vehicle traffic as the driver navigates through the urban intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit urban corridor into the expansive, sun-drenched heights of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by navigating a narrow covered passage defined by red and black facades and glowing digital billboards, steering around a parked white van. As the vehicle emerges from the enclosure, the artificial light gives way to brilliant morning sunlight on a wide elevated highway flanked by towering glass skyscrapers and palm trees. The scene then shifts as the camera follows a silver sports car through an urban canyon, with the road descending along curved ramps. Finally, the movement glides under overhead bridges and alongside elevated monorail tracks, maintaining speed as it weaves deeper into the dense cityscape.

The shot follows a continuous descent from a sheltered transit ramp into the vibrant chaos of a downtown city center. It begins by winding down a curving ramp, alternating between the shadow of covered tunnel sections and brief flashes of open air against concrete walls. As the vehicle continues its downward trajectory, the darkness recedes and the scene opens into bright daylight upon reaching ground level. The environment then shifts into a bustling urban intersection, moving past commercial shops and pedestrians on the sidewalks. Finally, the camera navigates through moderate traffic under overhead signals and across marked crosswalks as it integrates into the flow of the busy street.
